title: 我的钱包丢了
description_uz: «Senga nima bo'ldi? Xafa ko'rinyapsan.» — Bir do'st hamyonini yo'qotadi, ikkinchisi unga nima qilishni maslahat beradi: bank kartasini bloklatish, shaxsiy guvohnomani qayta rasmiylashtirish va ehtiyot bo'lish. Bu dialog muammoni tushuntirish, maslahat berish va tasalli berishni mashq qiladi. Kundalik hayotdagi foydali so'zlarga boy. Rol o'ynash uchun ajoyib.
description_ru: «Что с тобой? Выглядишь расстроенным.» — Один друг теряет кошелёк, второй советует, что делать: заблокировать карту, восстановить паспорт и быть осторожнее. Диалог тренирует объяснение проблемы, советы и утешение. Богат полезной повседневной лексикой. Отлично подходит для ролевой игры.
description_en: «What's wrong? You look unhappy.» — One friend loses their wallet, and the other advises what to do: block the bank card, get a new ID, and be more careful. The dialogue practices explaining a problem, giving advice, and comforting someone. Rich in useful everyday vocabulary. Great for role-play.

sentences.text_original: 你怎么了？看起来不开心。
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ zěnme le? Kàn qǐlái bù kāixīn.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_translation_en: Huh? Where did you lose it?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 可能在公交车上，我不太确定。
sentences.pinyin: Kěnéng zài gōngjiāo chē shàng, wǒ bú tài quèdìng.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Возможно, в автобусе, я не очень уверен.
sentences.text_translation_en: Maybe on the bus — I'm not really sure.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 有一点现金，还有身份证和银行卡。
sentences.pinyin: Yǒu yìdiǎn xiànjīn, hái yǒu shēnfènzhèng hé yínháng kǎ.
sentences.text_translation: Ozgina naqd pul, yana shaxsiy guvohnoma va bank kartasi bor edi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Немного наличных, а ещё паспорт и банковская карта.
sentences.text_translation_en: A little cash, plus my ID card and bank card.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 那你赶紧挂失银行卡吧。
sentences.pinyin: Nà nǐ gǎnjǐn guàshī yínháng kǎ ba.
sentences.text_translation: Unda tezda bank kartasini bloklatib qo'y.
sentences.text_translation_en: Then hurry and report your bank card lost.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Yǐjīng dǎ diànhuà gěi yínháng le.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_translation: Shaxsiy guvohnomani qayta rasmiylashtirish ancha mashaqqatli.
sentences.text_translation_en: Getting a new ID card is fairly troublesome.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_translation_ru: Да, нужно идти в отделение полиции.
sentences.text_translation_en: Yeah — I have to go to the police station.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 以后钱包别放裤子后面的口袋。
sentences.pinyin: Yǐhòu qiánbāo bié fàng kùzi hòumiàn de kǒudài.
sentences.text_translation: Bundan keyin hamyonni shimning orqa cho'ntagiga solma.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Впредь не клади кошелёк в задний карман брюк.
sentences.text_translation_en: From now on, don't put your wallet in your back pocket.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Nǐ shuō de duì, tài róngyì diào le.
sentences.text_translation: To'g'ri aytasan, juda oson tushib ketadi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Ты прав, он слишком легко выпадает.
sentences.text_translation_en: You're right — it falls out too easily.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 别太难过了，下次注意就好。
sentences.pinyin: Bié tài nánguò le, xià cì zhùyì jiù hǎo.
sentences.text_translation: Ko'p xafa bo'lma, keyingi safar ehtiyot bo'lsang bo'ldi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Не расстраивайся сильно, в следующий раз будь внимательнее.
sentences.text_translation_en: Don't be too upset — just be careful next time.
sentences.speaker: A
